summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Users & Roles RBAC feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Scroll-to-top fixes on /join-team and /growth-partner pages verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/roles - Returns list of roles (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/roles - Create new role with permissions (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/roles - Duplicate role name rejected (400)
Backend: PATCH /api/roles/{role_id} - Update role permissions (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - Delete non-system role (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - System role deletion blocked (400)
Backend: GET /api/team-users - Returns list of team users (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/team-users - Create user with role_id (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/team-users - Duplicate username rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/team-users - Duplicate email rejected (400)
Backend: PATCH /api/team-users/{user_id} - Update user role (200 OK)
Backend: PATCH /api/team-users/{user_id} - Toggle active/inactive status (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/team-users/{user_id} - Delete user (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - Cannot delete role with assigned users (400)
Frontend: Users & Roles page loads at /admin/users
Frontend: Users tab displays list with name, email, username, role, status columns
Frontend: Roles tab displays roles with permissions shown
Frontend: Add Role button opens modal with permissions selection
Frontend: Add User button opens modal with role dropdown
Frontend: Create role via UI - success toast shown
Frontend: Create user with role assignment via UI - success toast shown
Frontend: Edit user modal opens correctly
Frontend: Delete user via UI - success toast shown
Frontend: Toggle user active/inactive status works
Frontend: /join-team page scrolls to top on navigation
Frontend: /growth-partner page scrolls to top on navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component
updated_files: /app/tests/test_users_roles.py - Created comprehensive test file for Users & Roles RBAC feature
seed_data_creation: Test roles and users created during UI testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Users & Roles RBAC feature fully tested and working: 1) Roles CRUD - create/read/update/delete roles with permissions, system roles protected from deletion. 2) Team Users CRUD - create/read/update/delete users with role assignment, duplicate username/email validation. 3) Role-User relationship - users can be assigned roles, roles with assigned users cannot be deleted. 4) UI features - tabs for Users/Roles, modals for add/edit, toggle status, delete confirmation. 5) Scroll-to-top fixes verified on /join-team and /growth-partner pages.

Roles_CRUD.details: GET /api/roles returns all roles. POST /api/roles creates new role with name, description, permissions. PATCH /api/roles/{id} updates role. DELETE /api/roles/{id} deletes non-system roles only.

Team_Users_CRUD.details: GET /api/team-users returns all users. POST /api/team-users creates user with role_id. PATCH /api/team-users/{id} updates user including role change. DELETE /api/team-users/{id} deletes user.

Role_Assignment.details: Users can be assigned roles via role_id field. Role permissions are inherited by user. Users without role_id show 'Custom' role.

System_Role_Protection.details: Roles with is_system=true cannot be deleted. Returns 400 error with message 'Cannot delete system roles'.

Role_User_Dependency.details: Roles with assigned users cannot be deleted. Returns 400 error with count of assigned users.

Scroll_To_Top_JoinTeam.details: JoinTeamPage.jsx has useEffect with window.scrollTo(0, 0) on mount. Page scrolls to top when navigated to.

Scroll_To_Top_GrowthPartner.details: GrowthPartnerPage.jsx has useEffect with window.scrollTo(0, 0) on mount. Page scrolls to top when navigated to.
